title: ochna congoensis
intro: Ochna congoensis, also known as the Congo plane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is valued for its potential to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Ochna congoensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
